title: Camilla
content:
Camilla calls me heartless: hence you see
    Logic in love has little part.
    How can I otherwise than heartless be
    Seeing Camilla has my heart?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Victor James Daley delivers a powerful performance in "Camilla"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
